hero.title: Settings
hero.subtitle: Preferences, data, and your business profile

business.title: Company & business
business.description: Legal and contact details used on invoices and inside the app.

tax.title: GST & tax
tax.description: Default GST rate, price mode, place of supply, and invoice field options.

discounts.title: Discounts
discounts.description: Toggle discount types on invoices and manage coupons and tiered rules.

appearance.title: Appearance
appearance.description: Theme, accent color, display name, calendar week start, and number formatting.

security.title: Security
security.description: PIN, master key, and locking the app on this device.

activity.title: Activity log
activity.description: Recent changes across the app. Filters apply to the list below.

appUpdates.title: App updates
appUpdates.description: Check whether a newer version is available and open the download page in your browser.

data.title: Data & backups
data.description: Export, import, or reset your database. Irreversible actions require confirmation.

appUpdates.intro: We compare your version to a small file online. If a newer release exists, you can open the download page in your browser and install it manually.

errors.invalidJson: The update server returned data that is not valid JSON.
errors.invalidManifest: The update response was missing required fields or URLs.
errors.timeout: The request timed out. Try again later.
errors.badCurrentVersion: This build does not report a valid version.
errors.badStatus: The update server returned an error status.
errors.generic: Something went wrong while checking. Try again later.
errors.staleBridge: This window is using an older app bridge (preload). Quit the app completely and open it again. If you develop locally: keep npm run dev running so main recompiles, run npm run build:main once, then restart Electron.

appUpdates.updateAvailableHint: Open the download page, get the installer for your system, then install it over this app.
appUpdates.upToDate: You are up to date (latest listed: v{{latest}}).

preferences.languageHint: Choose the language used across the app.
preferences.weekStartsOnHint: Used for Home calendar week totals, charts, and the “This week” date preset. Default is Monday.
preferences.themeHint: Choose light, dark, or follow your system preference.
preferences.brandColorHint: Pick an accent color used throughout the app.
preferences.appDisplayNameHint: Shown in sidebar header, PDFs and print. Max {{max}} characters. Leave blank for default.
preferences.numberAbbreviationHint: How large counts and rupee amounts are shortened on dashboard heroes (Home, Products, Units, Lenders). Amounts below the threshold stay fully written with grouping.

abbreviationHints.indian: Full amount under 1 Lac; then Lac and Cr (e.g. 12.5 Lac).
abbreviationHints.us: Full amount under 1 million; then M and B.
abbreviationHints.si: Thousands as K, then M and B (powers of 1000).

tax.placeOfSupplyExtra: Seller's state; shown on Tax Invoice PDF
tax.hsn: Enable HSN (Harmonized System of Nomenclature) code

discounts.togglesHint: Enable or disable each discount type. Disabled types will not appear in the invoice form.
discounts.couponsSectionHint: Manage coupon codes and tiered (volume) discount rules. Enable coupons and tiered discounts in discount toggles above.

fields.round_bill_to_whole: Round final bill to nearest whole number

coupons.title: Coupons
coupons.deleteMessage: Delete this coupon? It cannot be used after deletion.
coupons.tieredHint: Either % or flat amount per rule. Use max amount to cap the discount. Highest qualifying tier applies.

tiered.title: Tiered rules
tiered.maxDiscountExtra: Optional cap on total discount from this rule

data.exportDbHint: Back up all your data to a file.
data.importDbHint: Restore data from a backup file.
data.clearAllHint: Remove all records but keep your settings.
data.dangerIntro: These actions affect your database. Use with care.
data.exportMessage: You'll save a full copy of your database to a file. Keep this backup somewhere safe—for example on an external drive or in the cloud—so you can restore your business data if anything goes wrong. Your current data stays untouched; this only creates a snapshot you can use for backup, migration, or peace of mind.
data.importMessage: You're about to replace everything in this app with the data from the file you select. Use this to restore from a backup or to move data from another machine. Your current database will be overwritten and cannot be recovered. Make sure you've exported a backup first if you might need it.
data.clearTablesMessage: Every table will be emptied: items, lenders, transactions, invoices, daily sales, and settings. The database structure stays in place so you can start fresh without losing units or schema. Use this when you want to wipe all business data but keep the app ready for new entries. This cannot be undone.
data.clearEntireDbMessage: The database file will be deleted and a brand-new empty database will be created. Use this for a complete fresh start. All your data—items, lenders, invoices, everything—will be gone forever. Export a backup first if you might need to refer to this data later. This cannot be undone.
data.populateSampleMessage: This will insert a small set of realistic sample items, lenders, invoices, transactions, and daily sales into an empty database so you can explore the app. It only runs when there is no existing business data; if you've already started using the app, nothing will be changed.
data.exportButtonTitle: Save a copy of the database to a file
data.importButtonTitle: Replace current database with a backup file
data.clearButtonTitle: Delete all rows in all tables; schema is kept
data.resetButtonTitle: Delete the database file and create a new empty one
data.sampleButtonTitle: Fill all main tables with realistic sample data (only when empty)
data.footerNote: Clear all data: empties every table but keeps the structure. Reset database: removes the database file and creates a new empty database.

security.ownerRecoveryHint: Set a recovery key for yourself as the owner. Use it to reset your PIN if you forget it. Changing this invalidates any previous recovery key.
security.sessionHint: Lock the app immediately. PIN required to re-enter.

activityLog.emptyFiltered: Try clearing action or entity filters to see more entries.
activityLog.emptyDefault: Changes you make across the app will show up here.

toast.importReplaced: Database imported. Data has been replaced.
toast.clearTablesSuccess: All data cleared. Tables are empty.
toast.resetDbSuccess: Database reset. A fresh database has been created.
toast.sampleDataSuccess: Sample data populated into empty tables.

confirm.clearBody: All items, lenders, transactions, and invoices will be removed. Settings will remain.
confirm.resetBody: Everything will be wiped, including your business profile.
